utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final plan: health_coverage is present with both physical and mental and their costs; property_coverage is present but set to "N/A" which is not fully specified with costs; travel_coverage is present with a base plan and cost; additional_services is present with an item and cost; total_budget is present with monthly and annual costs. Fully specified items according to the required details: health_coverage (has both components and costs), travel_coverage (has plan and cost), additional_services (has service and cost), total_budget (has monthly/annual breakdown). property_coverage is not fully specified as it lacks coverage and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, InsurePlus Standard Plan for travel insurance, and Adventure Travel Coverage as an add-on. Property coverage is N/A, so no mapping there. Using the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) rating is 9; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) rating is 9; InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel insurance) rating is 10; Adventure Travel Coverage rating is 10.
